content.en:
"Top Forbidden Spirit Root Tree!"

Ye Tian was also moved, and went to compete for the top forbidden spirit root tree as soon as possible.

However, he didn't let Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue snatch the Forbidden Spirit Root Tree, after all, their strength was still far from the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and once they went, it would be very dangerous.

Moreover, when it was so chaotic, he might not be able to protect the two of them.

And so.

Ye Tian and the Dark King of the Replica Body both went.

Soon, he came to the Forbidden Continent Fragment.

This Forbidden Continent fragment was suspended in the void, incompatible with the Forbidden Continent, and it must have been a Forbidden Continent that the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle had swallowed from the Dark Forbidden Domain.

At this time, the top-level forbidden spirit root tree had been destroyed by the fighting battle of the invincible Dao Ancestors, and it was the fragments that the invincible Dao Ancestors snatched.

Swish!

Ye Tianhe's copy body Dark King also flew over and joined the snatching ranks.

The Dark King has a good reputation, and he is qualified to snatch the Forbidden Spirit Root Tree, and the Invincible Dao Ancestors also recognize it.

However, Ye Tian's main body, the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, did not show the combat power of the invincible Dao Ancestor, nor did he have an amazing record, which caused some Invincible Dao Ancestors to be unhappy.

"Get out of here, even the strongest Dao Ancestor dares to come and snatch the top-level forbidden spirit root tree!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor shouted coldly at Ye Tian.

This Invincible Dao Ancestor is none other than the Peerless Dao Ancestor.

The Peerless Dao Ancestor held a medium forbidden weapon-level long sword and slashed at Ye Tian in the air, Ye Tian sneered, and crushed the sword qi of the Peerless Dao Ancestor with one hand.

"How could it be !!"

Peerless Dao Ancestor was shocked.

He is an invincible Dao Ancestor, and he is not weak among the invincible Dao Ancestors, his sword is enough to kill a top supreme Dao Ancestor in seconds, even if those who are more rebellious to the sky can resist his attack, it will definitely not be easy.

But Ye Tian actually blocked his attack directly with his hand, which was too exaggerated.

In fact, Ye Tian used the Forbidden Dao Technique, the Nine Pole Armor, to be able to defend the whole body, so he was able to block the blow of the Peerless Dao Ancestor with his hand.

Ye Tian didn't fight back against the Peerless Dao Ancestor, it was completely unnecessary, but instead cast the Forbidden Dao Technique, Shadow Escape, to snatch those top-level forbidden spirit root tree fragments at an extremely fast speed.

Wushuang Dao Ancestor scolded secretly, and did not deliberately find fault, went to find trouble with Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor Ye Tian, and also began to snatch other forbidden spirit root tree fragments.

It didn't take long for the Forbidden Spirit Root Tree fragments to be snatched up, and not a single fragment was left.

These invincible Dao Ancestors are also very simple, and they leave immediately after snatching them, without delaying time at all.

But when the Peerless Dao Ancestor was about to leave, Ye Tian stopped him.

"Wushuang Dao Ancestor, you attacked me for no reason before, so you want to leave?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Hmph, you're just a Supreme Dao Ancestor, what if I attack?"

The Peerless Dao Ancestor did not hesitate at all.

"Then let you see the strength of my Supreme Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian made a move.

He didn't cast the Forbidden Dao Technique: Dark Extreme Dao Spear, because once the Forbidden Dao Technique was cast exactly the same, it would almost be concluded that Ye Tian and the Dark King were the same person, after all, the Dao Technique could be exactly the same, and many Dao Ancestor Legions must almost all cultivate the same Dao Technique.

But the forbidden Dao technique is definitely different, otherwise it is the same person.

Therefore, the Dark King usually only casts the two forbidden Dao techniques of the Shadow Thorn and the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, and as the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian naturally does not use these two Dao techniques.

I saw that he took out a top-level forbidden weapon-level long knife, which was a forbidden weapon that he forged later, and it was only for the main body.

Although he didn't cast the Forbidden Dao Technique Shadow Thorn and the Dark Extreme Dao Spear, Ye Tian was able to cast the Shadow Escape and Defense Forbidden Dao Technique: Nine Pole Armor, and his combat power was almost too much, coupled with the assistance of the top forbidden weapon-level knife, it was enough to stop the Peerless Dao Ancestor.

Thundered!!!!

The Peerless Dao Ancestor was stopped and fought with Ye Tian, but because Ye Tian did not perform the forbidden Dao technique of attacking, he was suppressed throughout the whole process.

But suddenly.

A spear pierced his neck in an instant, taking away a large patch of blood.

It hurt him!

"It's you, the Dark King!"

Wushuang Dao Ancestor was furious.

Wow!

The Dark King appeared, and it was the attack he cast just now, with the weirdness of the Shadow Thorn, the Peerless Dao Ancestor couldn't react at all, and he couldn't stop it.

Immediately, Ye Tian and his own copy body, the Dark King, attacked the Peerless Dao Ancestor at the same time, and the Peerless Dao Ancestor did not have the strength to fight back at all, and soon the injury was not light.

Abrupt.

In the distance, an invincible Dao Ancestor's aura crossed over, and it was another invincible Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect.

"Gone!"

Ye Tian is not ready to fight, the invincible Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect is not only the Peerless Dao Ancestor, if he wants to kill the Peerless Dao Ancestor, the other invincible Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect will definitely not care, and the invincible Dao Ancestor of the Black Wind Mountain will not follow Ye Tian to mess around.

Therefore, at most, he would hurt the Peerless Dao Ancestor, and it would be unrealistic to kill the Peerless Dao Ancestor.

Woohoo!

Ye Tian and the Dark King disappeared in an instant, leaving behind the Peerless Dao Ancestor with multiple wounds on his body.

"It's okay!"

The Soul Assassin Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect appeared and asked.

"It's okay!" Wushuang Dao Ancestor shook his head.

"You don't provoke that Wanfa Dao Ancestor, his background is deeper than ours, and now his combat power is not much weaker than yours, don't completely offend him, one day he becomes a half-step domain ancestor, you will die!" Soul Assassin Dao Ancestor persuaded.

"I see!"

Peerless Dao Ancestor nodded.

......

Ye Tian sorted out the top-grade Spirit Root Tree fragments he had snatched, and this small piece of fragments was comparable to all the Spirit Root Liquid of an entire Forbidden Spirit Root Tree before.

Once, the Forbidden Spirit Root Tree he snatched was only equivalent to a top-level strange thing at best, and this Forbidden Spirit Root Tree was comparable to a top-level forbidden treasure!

That is to say, the half-step domain ancestors did not detect the existence of this forbidden spirit root tree, so they missed it, otherwise it would not be their turn to be the strongest Dao Ancestor and the invincible Dao Ancestor at all.

"So many top-level forbidden spirit root tree fragments are enough to double my cultivation!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

Next, Ye Tian and his children continued to look for opportunities in the world of wood, but they didn't find many good things, so they set off and left here and entered the world of water in the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle.

The world of water.

After Ye Tian came in, he didn't sense the aura of the forbidden strange thing, but there were still many supreme Dao Ancestors and invincible Dao Ancestors staying here.

These Dao Ancestors are hunting the water beasts of the Water World!

The Water World is a world that presents an infinite ocean, where countless water beasts live.

Through copying talents, Ye Tian learned that these water beasts belonged to a special race, strictly speaking, they all belonged to water source beasts!

Moreover, through the introduction, he knew that these water beasts could repair the original injury, nourish the body, and repair the defects of the body.

Immediately, Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue also joined the ranks of hunting water source beasts.
